hero.title: How we
hero.subtitle: From a curated table for two to a full venue buyout for fifty. Choose the experience that fits your occasion.

items.title: Social
items.subtitle: Date nights, girls' nights, and themed evenings.
items.description: For those looking to enjoy a curated vibe without the commitment of a full buyout. Reserve a table, enjoy chef-crafted menus, and soak in our signature ambiance.

items.title: Private
items.subtitle: Birthdays, showers, corporate, and intimate celebrations.
items.description: Our bread and butter. We provide an all-inclusive experience including the venue, custom decor, catering, and staff. Host the perfect event without lifting a finger.

items.title: Luxury
items.subtitle: The KKD culinary experience at your location.
items.description: Want the food without the space? Our chef-driven catering services bring elevated menus to you. Available for service zones across the Greater Houston area.
